stereotype: «ResourceAccess» — owns durableExecutionRuntime (Temporal cluster for cloud/remote profile; embedded single-process executor for local/embedded profile); sole permitted caller of that resource
volatility: Manager-sequencing face of WorkflowRuntime volatility — how Managers are durably sequenced. Two runtime instances per deployment profile (amended 2026-05-30): Temporal cluster (cloud) and embedded single-process executor (local/Obj 8).

outbound.name: durableExecutionRuntime
outbound.how: direct, by value — execute workflow / signal / query / register schedule via Temporal Go SDK client; idempotency runtime-native on ExecutionID

ops.signature: startOrSignalExecution(executionKind: ExecutionKind, executionId: ExecutionID, signalName: SignalName, payload: ExecutionPayload) → ExecutionHandle
ops.stereotype: Client-side entry verb · idempotent on executionId · signal-with-start semantics
ops.note: Starts a new execution or delivers a signal to an existing one by id; returns once durably accepted; unifies cold-start and resume-by-id.

fields.name: ExecutionKind
fields.note: logical workflow-type identity; maps to infrastructure type+taskqueue internally

fields.name: ExecutionId
fields.note: caller-supplied deterministic continuity token; runtime-native idempotency key

fields.name: SignalName
fields.note: optional — empty starts a fresh execution; set for signal-with-start semantics

fields.name: Payload
fields.note: ExecutionPayload struct { Bytes []byte; ContentType string } — opaque to this contract

fields.name: Handle
fields.note: opaque infrastructure-defined identity (Temporal WorkflowID+RunID pair); String()/Equal() helpers

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: ErrTransient(retryable) | ErrUnknownKind | ErrContractMisuse (non-retryable); ErrAlreadyExists mapped to success internally

ops.signature: deliverSignal(targetExecutionId: ExecutionID, signalName: SignalName, payload: ExecutionPayload) → void
ops.stereotype: Activity-wrapped (by sending Manager) · at-least-once cross-execution signal · ErrNotFound terminal
ops.note: Delivers a point-to-point durable signal to a named running execution; drives the cross-Manager applyDelinquencyPolicy queued edge.

ops.stereotype: Activity-wrapped or startup-wiring · idempotent on scheduleId · last-writer-wins update
ops.note: Registers (or updates) a recurring schedule; safe to call on every server boot; firing-level dedup is runtime-native.

fields.name: Spec
fields.note: ScheduleSpec struct { ExecutionKind ExecutionKind; Cadence Cadence; TargetIDTemplate string; StartPayload ExecutionPayload }

ops.signature: queryExecutionState(executionId: ExecutionID, queryName: QueryName, args: ExecutionPayload) → ExecutionStateView
ops.stereotype: pure read · cross-execution query · ErrNotFound / ErrQueryRejected terminal
ops.note: Returns point-in-time technical execution status and named query-handler result; drives mcpClient queryCostProjection read-only path.

fields.name: QueryResult
fields.note: serialised query-handler result; empty if not Running/Completed

dataContracts: ExecutionKind string // logical workflow-type identity; maps to infrastructure type+taskqueue internally
ExecutionID string // caller-supplied deterministic continuity token; runtime-native idempotency key
SignalName string // logical signal channel name
QueryName string // logical query handler name
ExecutionPayload struct { Bytes []byte, ContentType string } // opaque to this contract
ExecutionHandle struct { opaque string } // infrastructure-opaque; String()/Equal() helpers
ScheduleSpec struct { ExecutionKind, Cadence, TargetIDTemplate string, StartPayload ExecutionPayload }
Cadence struct { Every time.Duration, CronExpr string } // infrastructure-neutral recurrence
ExecutionStateView struct { Handle, Status ExecutionStatus, QueryResult []byte, StartedAt time.Time, ClosedAt *time.Time }
ExecutionStatus int // Running | Completed | Failed | Cancelled | TimedOut
DurableExecutionError struct { Kind ErrorKind, Cause error, Retryable bool }
ErrorKind int // ErrUnknown | ErrTransient | ErrNotFound | ErrUnknownKind | ErrQueryRejected | ErrAlreadyExists | ErrInfrastructure | ErrContractMisuse
errorModel: DurableExecutionError with explicit Retryable flag. ErrTransient retryable=true; all others retryable=false. ErrAlreadyExists is informational — startOrSignalExecution maps it to success (returns existing handle), never surfaces it. No Temporal types on the error surface.
idempotency: startOrSignalExecution: runtime-native on ExecutionID (caller-supplied continuity token); AlreadyExists → return existing handle. registerSchedule: idempotent on scheduleId (last-writer-wins update on re-register). deliverSignal: at-least-once; dedup responsibility belongs to sending Manager's Activity or receiving handler. queryExecutionState: pure read, trivially idempotent.

revisions.summary: Designed Temporal-free from inception per D-AA Rev 2 layering directive; 4 cross-execution control-plane ops; in-workflow primitives (startTimer/awaitSignal/executeChild) explicitly excluded as Manager-owned category-A; OQ-1..6 drafted.

APPROVE-AND-FREEZE: 9/9 App C §6 PASS, 0 WAIVED. OQ-1 category-A/B split confirmed grounded in operational-concepts §2 interaction map. OQ-2 Client→RA control-plane topology confirmed legal (not a closed-layering violation). OQ-3 deliverSignal dedup kept off contract. OQ-4 unregisterSchedule deferred (offboarding undesigned). OQ-5 no terminateExecution confirmed. OQ-6 StatusRunning collapse confirmed. 4 non-blocking follow-ups for arch.

Additive §0 amendment: records embedded single-process executor as second runtime instance; promotes portability-boundary clause (no runtime-specific primitive may be added) and determinism acceptance criterion (embedded executor must match Temporal replay semantics). Senior-frozen surface unchanged; no re-freeze required.
